[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11000011 4
1 01001001 3
2 00000000 a
3 00000000 a
4 01010001 3
5 10000101 3
6 01000100 2
7 01111000 4
